(module StringReverser
  (defun reverse_string ((s : Str)) : Str
    (def len : Num (str.length s))
    (if (< len 2)
      (return "")
      (return (str.concat (str.substring s 0 (- len 1)) (str.substring s (- len 1) 0))))

(module GradeAverage
